name: Openai
description: Integrates OpenAI's GPT models for automated text generation with customizable prompts.

OPENAI_API_KEY.label: Api Key
OPENAI_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to the OpenAI API.

OPENAI_BASE_URL.label: Base Url
OPENAI_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for all OpenAI API requests.

OPENAI_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
OPENAI_SMALL_MODEL.help: Identifier of the small language model to be used (overrides SMALL_MODEL).

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the small language model if OPENAI_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

OPENAI_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
OPENAI_LARGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the large language model to be used (overrides LARGE_MODEL).

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the large language model if OPENAI_LARGE_MODEL is not set.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model to use for generating text embeddings.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Embedding Url
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Custom base URL for the OpenAI embeddings endpoint.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.label: Embedding Api Key
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.help: Custom API key for the OpenAI embeddings endpoint.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for the returned embedding vectors.

OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.label: Image Description Model
OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for describing images.

OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKENS.label: Image Description Max Tokens
OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKENS.help: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the image-description model response.

OPENAI_TTS_MODEL.label: Tts Model
OPENAI_TTS_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for text-to-speech generation.

OPENAI_TTS_VOICE.label: Tts Voice
OPENAI_TTS_VOICE.help: Voice profile to use for text-to-speech output.

OPENAI_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.label: Tts Instructions
OPENAI_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.help: Optional instructions to control the style or behavior of the text-to-speech request.

OPENAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Experimental Telemetry
OPENAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

OPENAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Browser Base Url
OPENAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for OpenAI requests (no secrets in the client).

OPENAI_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Browser Embedding Url
OPENAI_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for OpenAI embeddings.
